subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from Our presence unto those upon the earth: Worship none but God, the Lord of all worlds. Beware lest ye be veiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا لمن علی الارض الا تعبدوا الا الله رب العالمین ایاکم ان تحجبکم
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @call to action
